name: Slow Cooker Chipotle Tacos

ingredients.item: 15-ounce cans pinto beans, drained and rinsed
chipotle pepper in adobo sauce (about 2 peppers), chopped
white corn taco shells or tortillas, or your favorite
Favorite toppings: spinach, lettuce, black olives, lime, avocado, peppers

method: Put everything in the crockpot except the taco shells and toppings. Cook on low for 3 to 4 hours or on high for 1½ to 2 hours.
Spread quite a bit of the filling on your taco shells, hard or soft. Add your favorite toppings.
